_note: Pool of semantic domains for forced-choice trials. The option_selector.py picks 3-4 from this pool per trial step, controlling whether the target domain is included (target-present vs target-absent trials). Domains are intentionally broad — the LLM's task is to pick the MOST consistent one, not to guess the exact word.

domains.label: WATER_LIQUID
domains.description_for_evaluation: Water, liquids, flowing, wet, rain, river, drinking

domains.description_for_evaluation: Earth, soil, ground, underground, digging, burial
